subcodes.first_line: The Fire hath appeared and the Light hath shone forth in this Manifestation wherein the Tongue of Grandeur proclaimeth: There is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهرت النار و سطع النور فیهذا الظهور الذی فیه ینطق لسان العظمه انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
